_note: G1 (M31-H3, ADR-0027 D3 / FINDINGS §2): table provenance manifest — every table declares WHY it exists (doc_ref or parent_concept or accepted_risk). Backfilled 2026-07-04 from the QA-verified register (heuristics + judgment tail per the amended plan; SIM P10). FROZEN as the baseline: the L0 gate (test_table_provenance.py) blocks only NEW provenance-less tables. Classes: direct (token-level doc hit) > child_of_traced (inherits parent's ref) > module_spec (owning module's SKILL.md — concept furniture; visibly weaker, G5 separately polices whole-module emptiness) > accepted_risk (FINDINGS A1) > runtime_ledger/runtime_created.
